_comment: Maps Alfred skills to the same buckets as MCP servers (cursor/mcp.json _buckets). Only skills whose bucket is in the machine's selected buckets (ALFRED_BUCKETS) are synced to ~/.agents/skills; the rest are removed on re-provision. Unlisted skills fall back to _default. 'packs' maps a skills/_packs/<name> vendored folder to a bucket. Bucket names must match cursor/mcp.json _buckets. 'core' is always installed.
